title: content creater
description:
Job Title

Multimedia Designer (Full-Time)

Location

Singapore

About the Role

We’re looking for a Multimedia Designer who understands the local vibe — social content, visuals, and storytelling that actually connect with people in Singapore.

You’ll be creating content for real projects, real clients, and real platforms (Instagram, TikTok, digital marketing). This role suits someone who enjoys both design and video, and wants their work to be seen, shared, and credited.

If you’re creative, hands-on, and tired of doing “just artwork revisions”, this role gives you space to grow. You show be familiar with AI content apps

What You’ll Do (Your Impact)

Content & Social Media Design

  • Design visuals for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and digital platforms

  • Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, project walkthroughs, before-after)

  • Support photo and video editing for marketing and project showcases

  • Create content that fits Singapore audience behaviour and trends

Branding & Marketing Support

  • Ensure visuals follow brand guidelines and stay consistent

  • Design simple marketing materials (posters, decks, digital ads)

  • Support campaigns, promotions, and project launches

  • Adapt content for different formats and platforms

Team Collaboration

  • Work closely with marketing, sales, and project teams

  • Support content needs for ongoing projects and site updates

  • Manage design files and content libraries properly

  • Assist with ad-hoc creative tasks when needed

Who This Role Is Great For

  • Local Multimedia / Visual Communication graduates

  • Fresh grads or junior creatives based in Singapore

  • Designers who enjoy both graphics and video editing

  • Creatives who want their work published, not stuck in drafts

What We’re Looking For

  • Diploma or Degree in Multimedia Design, Visual Communication, or related field

  • Fresh graduates welcome (portfolio matters more than years of experience)

  • Proficient in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro

  • Basic motion graphics / After Effects knowledge is a plus

  • Familiar with social media content styles in Singapore

  • Creative, responsible, and open to feedback

  • Able to manage timelines and revisions

What You Can Achieve With Us

By growing with us, you can:

  • Build a strong local portfolio with real, published projects

  • Learn how content supports branding, marketing, and sales

  • Develop confidence in handling briefs and creative direction

  • Grow into roles such as:

    • Senior Multimedia Designer,

    • Content / Creative Lead, or

    • Marketing & Brand Specialist

  • Be part of a team that values initiative, creativity, and consistency

Good ideas are encouraged. Good work gets recognised.

Why Join Us

  • Full-time, stable creative role in Singapore

  • Hands-on exposure to real projects and campaigns

  • Supportive SME team (no agency burnout culture)

  • Clear growth and learning opportunities

  • Salary commensurate with experience

  • Leave and benefits according to MOM guidelines

Working Hours

  • Monday to Friday, office hours

postedCompany.description:
About the Contractor Kaki

The Contractor Kaki Group is an integrated practice spanning design, carpentry, and construction, delivering projects with clarity and accountability from concept to completion.

Led by Kiren Pak, whose background in Product Design, Interior & Landscape Design, and Facility Management bridges creativity with technical rigour, the group is built on a deep understanding of materials, buildability, and execution.

The group comprises three complementary entities:

  • Contractor Kaki (Direct SG Contractor Pte Ltd) — a BCA-registered contractor focused on engineering discipline, quality workmanship, and robust technical processes

  • Interior Kaki — a design-led interior practice with in-house carpentry and showroom, creating spaces that reflect the homeowner’s lifestyle and identity

  • Builder Kaki — a BCA Class 2 licensed builder, strengthening the group’s capability in larger-scale and complex building works

By integrating design, carpentry, and construction under one umbrella, the Contractor Kaki Group ensures design intent is respected, execution is disciplined, and quality is consistent across every project.

We build with purpose — combining design integrity, technical excellence, and long-term performance.
The beauty of the design and the engineering that creates funtional yet athestic masterpiece for the end user. We also focus on our Quality Work and our Techincal Work Process to work towards good worksmanship.  We are always taking in feedback from Clients so that we can keep on improving our work process and our techincal skill. Whichever space we design we design for Human and not the space! We loves to work with creative mind or anyone whom is interested to learn regardless of race, age or even sexes. At Contractor Kaki- we loves to share our skills and knowledge to those whom want to build this trade as there main career. At here- you can learn and grow and master whatever you want. Come join us!
postedCompany.name: CONTRACTOR KAKI PTE. LTD.
